faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Somers home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small holes in wool clothing, cashmere, or upholstery, silky cocoons in closet corners, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes. You may also find shed larval casings in drawers or see adult moths attracted to lights at dusk. Our Somers technicians provide thorough inspections to assess the extent of infestation.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Somers typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, size of your home, and number of treatment areas required. Larger homes or extensive infestations affecting multiple rooms require more comprehensive treatment. We provide free estimates for all Somers residents.

faqs.question: How long does it take to eliminate clothes moths from my home?
faqs.answer: Most clothes moth treatments require 2-4 visits over 4-8 weeks to target all life stages, as eggs and pupae are resistant to many treatments. We use a combination of targeted insecticides, pheromone traps, and preventative measures to ensure complete elimination. Follow-up monitoring ensures moths don't return to your Somers home.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Somers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products specifically designed for indoor use that are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry. We also offer eco-friendly and low-toxicity options for sensitive households in Somers.
